title: engines.engine_intent_abandoned
description: ADR-038 Layer 3 (WS-277) terminal event — fired when founder cancels pre-flight before confirm. Friction signal: abandon-event rate >30% indicates contract is too heavy or smart defaults too wrong (AS-INTENT-2 falsification proxy).

fields_touched.description: Field names the founder edited before cancelling. Empty array = cancel without any edits.

elapsed_ms.description: How long pre-flight ran before cancel
